claimText: Supports healthy bone mineralization by aiding calcium absorption.
rationale: Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol) is well-established to support calcium absorption in the gut, which is essential for bone mineralization. This claim aligns with the mechanism of action described and avoids disease treatment implications.
requiredDisclosures: This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
forbiddenImplications: This claim must not imply treatment, cure, mitigation, diagnosis, or prevention of any disease.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.

claimText: Helps maintain muscle strength and function as part of a healthy lifestyle.
rationale: Calcitriol signaling supports muscle protein synthesis and function, which is consistent with structure/function claims for Vitamin D3 supplements without implying disease treatment.
requiredDisclosures: This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
forbiddenImplications: Must not imply treatment or prevention of muscle diseases or conditions.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.

claimText: Supports cardiovascular wellness by promoting healthy endothelial function.
rationale: Vitamin D3 influences endothelial nitric oxide synthase activity and supports vascular function, which can be communicated as a general wellness or structure/function claim without disease claims.
requiredDisclosures: This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
forbiddenImplications: Must not imply treatment or prevention of cardiovascular disease.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.

claimText: Supports immune system health and normal immune function.
rationale: Calcitriol modulates immune cell activity and supports immune system balance, which is an accepted structure/function claim for Vitamin D3 supplements.
requiredDisclosures: This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
forbiddenImplications: Must not imply treatment or prevention of infections or immune disorders.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.

claimText: Supports healthy weight management as part of a balanced diet and exercise program.
rationale: Vitamin D3’s role in adipocyte metabolism and leptin sensitivity supports a general wellness claim related to weight management without implying treatment of obesity or related diseases.
requiredDisclosures: This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
forbiddenImplications: Must not imply weight loss or treatment of obesity or metabolic diseases.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.

claimText: Supports brain and cognitive health as part of overall wellness.
rationale: Vitamin D3’s neuroprotective effects and support of neurotrophic factors can be communicated as a general wellness claim without implying treatment or prevention of cognitive diseases.
requiredDisclosures: This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
forbiddenImplications: Must not imply treatment or prevention of dementia, Alzheimer’s, or other cognitive disorders.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.

claimText: Supports gut health and intestinal barrier function.
rationale: Calcitriol’s role in upregulating tight junction proteins and modulating gut microbiome supports a structure/function claim related to gut health without disease claims.
requiredDisclosures: This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
forbiddenImplications: Must not imply treatment or prevention of gastrointestinal diseases.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.

claimText: Contains USDA Organic Certified, plant-based Vitamin D3 derived from organic pine sterols.
rationale: This claim accurately describes the source and certification of the ingredient, supporting transparency and consumer trust without making health claims.
forbiddenImplications: Must not imply superiority in efficacy or health outcomes compared to other Vitamin D3 sources.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.

claimText: Non-GMO Project Verified and vegan-friendly Vitamin D3 supplement.
rationale: This claim communicates product attributes relevant to consumer preferences without implying health benefits or disease claims.
forbiddenImplications: Must not imply health benefits or disease treatment.

citations.title: § 101.93 Certain types of statements for dietary supplements.
